User Management
Manage team access and roles
🔬 Interim Analysis Scenario
An interim analysis is a pre-planned review of efficacy/safety data mid-trial. The outcome can stop the trial early, expand it, or continue unchanged. This models the probability-weighted drug demand impact.
Possible Outcomes & Probabilities
✅ Early Stop — Efficacy
Drug works better than expected. Trial stops. Remaining supply = waste.
%
❌ Early Stop — Futility
Insufficient efficacy signal. Trial stops early. Remaining supply = waste.
%
⚠️ Early Stop — Safety
Serious adverse events. Trial stops immediately. Remaining supply = waste.
%
📈 Sample Size Increase
Higher variance observed. Additional patients added.
Add patients
%
▶️ Continue Unchanged
No action — trial proceeds as planned.
%
⚠ Probabilities must sum to 100%
✓ Probabilities sum to 100%
Invite Team Member
✉ An invitation email will be sent with a secure sign-in link. No temporary password needed.

Edit Forecast
Changes are saved as a new Draft version — activate when ready
ⓘ Click any cell to edit. Tab to move to the next month. Changes only affect L1 Finish Goods — downstream SKUs are BOM-derived automatically.

vs

Forecast Comparison

Forecast Versions
Upload Forecast
Upload an Excel file with two columns: Month (e.g. Jan-26 or 2026-01-31) and Qty (number). The system will create a new forecast version from the data.
📊
Drop file here or click to browse
.csv preferred · .xlsx supported if SheetJS available
Two columns: Month (e.g. Jan-26), Qty
Preview (first 6 months):
Time-phased plan driven by live SOs, WOs, POs and forecast. Green = surplus · Amber = below SS · Red = shortfall.
Receipts (adds inventory)
Distribution (reduces inventory)
Total Period-End = Proj. EOH + SS

🚀
Implementation Agent
Ask me anything about setup
▾
👋 Hi! I'm your Implementation Agent.

I'll guide you through setting up Meridian ERP step by step. You can:

• Ask me how to fill out any template
• Get help mapping your existing data
• Ask about pharma supply chain best practices

Which step would you like to start with?
Add Inventory Item
New Purchase Order
Order Total: $0.00
New Bill of Materials
Add Batch
✓
New SKU
New Supplier
Check all materials this supplier provides
New Customer
🔐 Electronic Signature Required
Edit
New Work Order
Select a SKU to see required inputs
Purchase Goods Receipt
Use this form to receive raw materials (L4-RM-A, L4-RM-B) from a supplier PO. Posting this GR will increase inventory and create a new batch record.
Section 1 — Receipt Details
Batch Assignment
Production Goods Receipt
Use this form to receive production output (DS, DP, FG). Specify the output batch and the input materials consumed from specific batches.
Section 1 — Production Output (What you made)
Section 2 — Input Materials Consumed (What you used)
Select a Work Order to see required input materials
New Customer PO
Record a customer purchase order — system will auto-generate the Sales Order on confirmation
Customer Purchase Order Details
The PO number on the customer's purchase order document
🧠
Meridian Assistant
Powered by Claude
👋 Hi! I'm your Meridian ERP assistant. I can help you with:

• How-to guides — step-by-step instructions
• Troubleshooting — diagnose issues
• Data questions — ask about your live data
• Training — learn the system

What would you like help with?
↩ Reverse Goods Receipt
⚠ This action cannot be undone
Reversing this GR will reduce inventory by the received quantity and update the PO status. A reversal audit entry will be created.
Material Movement
